message:
🌱 Add opentelemetry-operator: Autoscaler doesn't scale deployment when MinReplicas is set mission (#1573)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opentelemetry-operator-4400-autoscaler-doesn-t-scale-deployment-when-minreplicas",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opentelemetry-operator: Autoscaler doesn't scale deployment when MinReplicas is set",
+    "description": "Autoscaler doesn't scale deployment when MinReplicas is set. This issue affects 16+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify opentelemetry-operator troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your opentelemetry-operator deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator -n opentelemetry-operator --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review opentelemetry-operator configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant opentelemetry-operator configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator\nkubectl get configmap -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentelemetry-operator\n```\nWhen using HPA with OpenTelemetryCollector, the deployment doesn't scale when HPA decides it needs more replicas."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Autoscaler doesn't scale deployment when MinReplicas is set",
+        "description": "<Describe what has changed.>\nThe issue was already well described in the original report. However, the operator currently always returns the values defined in spec, and autoscaler.minValues never scales up. I’ve fixed this problem. I also renamed the function to GetDesiredReplicas, since it’s not\n```yaml\napiVersion: opentelemetry.io/v1beta1\n   kind: OpenTelemetryCollector\n   metadata:\n     name: backend-traces\n     namespace: monitoring\n   spec:\n     autoscaler:\n       minReplicas: 3\n       maxReplicas: 6\n       targetCPUUtilization: 80\n       targetMemoryUtilization: 50\n     # ... rest of collector config\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Autoscaler doesn't scale deployment when… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator -n opentelemetry-operator --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n opentelemetry-operator --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "<Describe what has changed.>\nThe issue was already well described in the original report. However, the operator currently always returns the values defined in spec, and autoscaler.minValues never scales up. I’ve fixed this problem. I also renamed the function to GetDesiredReplicas, since it’s not only called during initialization but also on every reconciliation.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: opentelemetry.io/v1beta1\n   kind: OpenTelemetryCollector\n   metadata:\n     name: backend-traces\n     namespace: monitoring\n   spec:\n     autoscaler:\n       minReplicas: 3\n       maxReplicas: 6\n       targetCPUUtilization: 80\n       targetMemoryUtilization: 50\n     # ... rest of collector config",
+        "❯ k get hpa backend-traces-collector\n    NAME                       REFERENCE                               TARGETS            MINPODS   MAXPODS   REPLICAS   AGE\n    backend-traces-collector   OpenTelemetryCollector/backend-traces   62%/50%, 42%/80%   3         6        5           386d",
+        "❯ k get deployment backend-traces-collector -o jsonpath='{.spec.replicas}'\n   3⏎"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "opentelemetry-operator",
+      "incubating",
+      "observability",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "opentelemetry-operator"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Deployment",
+      "Namespace"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-operator/issues/4400",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-operator",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-operator/pull/4401"
+    },
+    "reactions": 16,
+    "comments": 1,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with opentelemetry-operator installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-20T06:31:33.278Z",

+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
